heroHeadline: Ben-Gvir Storms Al-Aqsa Compound for Third Time This Year, Sparking Palestinian Condemnation
heroSubtitle: Israeli National Security Minister Ben-Gvir entered the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound with settlers on April 12, 2026 — his third incursion this year — violating the 1967 status quo arrangement. Palestinians and Jordan condemned the visit as a desecration. Israeli forces also conducted overnight raids across the occupied West Bank.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
